posts.author: eitanal (Eitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
I have 2 suggestions regarding the Webhooks:

  1. The window of managing them is not comfortable to see the path and maintain the exists list.
  2. It could be nice if we can use Variables, so update of service will not require to update each one of the webhooks addresses.

Thanks
Eitan

posts.author: eitanal (Eitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
When I wrote it, I missed the new “Connection” tab you added.
so this page makes much brain to control all webhooks around all Boards.
BUT, still my second point, to be able to change the domain my service sits, today requires me to switch between all Boards and Automations and change the Webhook Path, instead of being able to modify it in the page and click Reconnect for example.
Thanks!
